name: Amazon Web Services
description: AWS — Amazon's cloud platform: S3, EC2, Lambda, DynamoDB, RDS, CloudFront, IAM, and 200+ services for compute, storage, AI, and observability.

seo.title: AWS Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: AWS overview: pricing model, lock-in risk, alternatives. The market-leading cloud platform with deep service breadth and proprietary primitives.

lock_in.explanation: High — proprietary services (DynamoDB, Lambda, IAM policies) make full migration multi-quarter.

transparency.reason: Pricing has 100+ pages; cost surprises are frequent.

developer_experience.reason: Mature SDKs but sprawling console and IAM friction.
